title: SaveFailedState lacks Note field; classifyCurrentSession cannot produce CurrentSessionDecision.dirty
description: REQ-EPNS-006 and REQ-EPNS-007 specify that classifyCurrentSession(SaveFailedState) returns { kind: 'dirty', noteId: currentNoteId, note: Note }. However, the type contract for SaveFailedState in capture/states.ts (lines 52-61) has fields: status, currentNoteId, pendingNextNoteId, lastSaveError. There is NO 'note: Note' field. The CurrentSessionDecision 'dirty' variant (stages.ts line 60) requires a 'note: Note' field. The spec does not explain where the Note instance comes from when the input state is SaveFailedState. This makes the classifyCurrentSession function unimplementable as specified for the save-failed path.
recommendation: Either (a) add a 'note: Note' field to SaveFailedState in the type contract so the unsaved content is preserved, or (b) change classifyCurrentSession for SaveFailedState to accept an additional Note parameter or retrieve it from a separate source, and document that mechanism in the spec. Option (a) is the DMMF-idiomatic approach: the state should carry all data needed for the next transition.
